**Scope**: 5 stories across 1 system (Foundation-layer ratification)
**Engine**: Godot 4.6 (GDScript)
**Sprint File**: `production/sprints/sprint-2.md` (S2-03 epic implementation)
**Epic File**: `production/epics/balance-data/EPIC.md`
**Governing ADR**: ADR-0006 (Accepted 2026-04-30)

## Test Summary

| Story | Type | Automated Test Required | Manual Verification Required |
|-------|------|------------------------|------------------------------|
| 001 Foundation-layer relocation | Integration | Existing `tests/unit/balance/balance_constants_test.gd` must pass at new path; full ≥501 regression | Smoke check + G-14 class-cache audit doc |
| 002 TR-traced test suite | Logic | 3 new unit tests + all-keys audit expansion in `tests/unit/balance/balance_constants_test.gd` | None (regression count delta documented in commit) |
| 003 Lint template | Config/Data | Bash lint runs in `.github/workflows/tests.yml`; tests against `src/foundation/` | Smoke evidence doc with exit-code report per lint invocation |
| 004 Orphan grep gate | Config/Data | New `lint_no_orphan_balance_data_paths.sh` in CI; AC-1 self-injection negative test | 6-section validation evidence doc |
| 005 Perf baseline + TD-041 | Logic | New `tests/unit/balance/balance_constants_perf_test.gd` (2 perf tests) | Perf summary doc; TD-041 register entry; AC-3 mobile p99 directly-measured OR Polish-deferred admin doc |

## Automated Tests Required

### Story 001 — Foundation-layer relocation (Integration)
**Test files** (existing — no new test files added by this story):
- `tests/unit/balance/balance_constants_test.gd:13` — `_BALANCE_CONSTANTS_PATH` const updated to `res://src/foundation/balance/balance_constants.gd`
- All consumer integration tests (`tests/integration/`) — class-name-based; no edits required after G-14 refresh

**What to test** (covered by existing 5+2 tests; verified post-relocation):
- File at `src/foundation/balance/balance_constants.gd` resolves via `class_name BalanceConstants` (TR-016)
- `BalanceConstants.get_const(key)` returns expected scalar / dict values for current 22-51 keys (TR-007 — extended in Story 002)
- `_cache_loaded` idempotent guard short-circuits subsequent calls (TR-019)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- G-14 class-cache violation: first test run after move WITHOUT `godot --headless --import` MUST fail with `Identifier "BalanceConstants" not declared` (AC-4 documents the failure case)
- AC-6 orphan grep: `grep -rn "res://src/feature/balance" src/ tests/ tools/` returns 0 matches post-move

**Estimated test count**: 0 new (existing 5+2 tests carry); 1 regression run mandatory (≥501 baseline)

---

### Story 002 — TR-traced unit test suite extension (Logic)
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/balance/balance_constants_test.gd` (extended in place)
**What to test**:
- **TR-007** all-keys coverage: `cases.size() >= file_scalar_key_count` programmatic count; every JSON dict key has a Dictionary-shape + inner-value spot-check (AC-1, AC-2)
- **TR-013** empty-file precheck — either implements `FileAccess.file_exists()` separation OR documents current single-message behaviour (AC-3 path A vs B; author judgement)
- **TR-019** idempotent-guard hardening: after `_cache_loaded = true` + `_cache = {}` (post-failure state), `get_const(any_key)` returns null without re-invoking `_load_cache()` (AC-4)
- **TR-020** cross-suite isolation canary: first line of test body asserts `_cache_loaded == false` AND `_cache.is_empty()` — protects against G-15 `before_each()` typo regressions (AC-5)
- **TR header annotations** on existing 5 + new 3 tests (AC-6)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- AC-1 negative case: a JSON key added to `balance_entities.json` but not to the test cases table MUST fail the audit
- G-23: use `is_not_equal(unwanted)` not `is_not_equal_approx` (does not exist in v6.1.2)
- G-16: parametric `cases: Array[Dictionary]` typed (not bare `Array`) to preserve type narrowing

**Estimated test count**: 3 new functions + 1 cases-table expansion = ~3 net new tests (501 → ~504 baseline)

---

### Story 003 — Per-system hardcoded-constant lint template (Config/Data)
**Test file path**: `tools/ci/lint_no_hardcoded_balance_constants.sh.template` OR parameterized `tools/ci/lint_no_hardcoded_balance_constants.sh` (Approach A vs B at story-readiness)
**What to test** (lint exit-code behaviour, not GDScript):
- **AC-2** existing `lint_damage_calc_no_hardcoded_constants.sh` continues to exit 0 against `src/feature/damage_calc/`
- **AC-3** generalized lint runs against `src/foundation/` with `balance_constants.gd` itself allow-listed; exit 0
- **AC-4** CI workflow `.github/workflows/tests.yml` invokes generalized lint at least once; fails workflow on exit ≥1

**Edge cases to cover**:
- **Story-008 silent-fail antipattern**: `set -euo pipefail` + `var=$(cmd)` + `if [ -n "$var" ]` traps tool-crash as pass; correct pattern is `if ! var=$(cmd 2>&1); then exit_code=$?; fi` (codified in damage-calc story-008 close-out)
- Anti-self-trigger: lint script must not contain the literal it grep-checks — use fragment concatenation or self-exclusion grep
- Tool-failure (exit ≥2) vs domain-failure (exit 1) distinction in CI logs

**Estimated test count**: 0 GDScript tests (lint-only); ~3 CI workflow assertions

---

### Story 004 — Orphan grep gate + Validation §1-§5 audit (Config/Data)
**Test file path**: `tools/ci/lint_no_orphan_balance_data_paths.sh` (NEW)
**What to test**:
- **AC-1** lint scans `src/`, `tests/`, `tools/` (NOT `production/`) for: `res://src/feature/balance/` (post-Story-001 orphan) AND `entities.json` without `balance_` prefix; exit 1 if either appears
- **AC-3** `tools/ci/lint_*.sh` files are themselves grep-audited for orphan `entities.json` references
- **AC-4** same-patch doc obligations from delta #9 verified: `data-files.md` Constants Registry Exception, ADR-0008/ADR-0012 cross-refs, architecture.yaml lines 262 + 573-574
- **AC-5** TD-041 entry presence in `docs/tech-debt-register.md` (provided by Story 005)
- **AC-7** CI wiring in `.github/workflows/tests.yml` (same lane as AC-DC-44 F-GB-PROV lint)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- **Self-trigger guard**: lint script's own contents must not match its own pattern (use fragment concat: `"res://" + "src/feature/" "balance/"`)
- **Allow-list discipline**: `production/epics/damage-calc/story-006b-*.md` historical refs are out of scope (lint must scope to source/test/tool dirs only)
- **AC-1 self-injection negative test**: introduce `res://src/feature/balance/` reference temporarily in `src/`; lint must exit 1; remove before merge
- **Coordination**: AC-5 BLOCKED until Story 005 lands TD-041 — recommend ordering 005 before 004

**Estimated test count**: 0 GDScript tests (lint-only); 1 new lint script + 1 new CI step

---

### Story 005 — Perf baseline + TD-041 (Logic)
**Test file path**: `tests/unit/balance/balance_constants_perf_test.gd` (NEW — distinct from unit test file per project convention; mirrors `damage_calc_perf_test.gd`)
**What to test**:
- **TR-015(a)** lazy-load first-call: `Time.get_ticks_usec()` delta on cold-cache `get_const("CHARGE_BONUS")` < 2000us (AC-1)
- **TR-015(b)** 10k cached-call throughput: pre-warmed cache + 10 different keys cycled 10000× total elapsed < 500_000us; per-call amortized < 50us (AC-2)
- **TR-015(c)** mobile p99: direct on-device measurement IF minimum-spec hardware available (Adreno 610 / Mali-G57 class, ARMv8, ≥4GB RAM, Android 12+/iOS 15+); ELSE Polish-deferred per 5-precedent pattern (AC-3)

**Edge cases to cover**:
- **Determinism note**: perf tests inherently noisy on CI — 2ms / 500ms thresholds include CI variance headroom (mirrors damage-calc story-010 conservative-threshold practice)
- **Variant boxing GC pressure**: 10k cached calls must not produce excessive allocations — production code structure per ADR-0006 §Architecture Diagram avoids per-call copy
- **G-15** `before_test()` cache reset mandatory; G-16 typed `Array[Dictionary]` for parametric cases
- **G-23** `is_less(N)` is the matcher — do NOT use the nonexistent `is_not_equal_approx`

**Estimated test count**: 2 new perf functions; +1 doc edit (TD-041 register entry); +1 evidence doc; conditional +1 admin Polish-deferral doc

**Open question for /dev-story upfront**: AC-3 mobile p99 path — does the user have access to a minimum-spec mobile device? YES → direct measurement; NO → Polish-deferral admin pass (4-element template).

## Manual QA Checklist

### Story 001 — Foundation-layer relocation (Integration)
**Verification method**: Smoke check after `git mv` + class-cache refresh + full regression
**Who must sign off**: lead-programmer (verifies G-14 dance)
**Evidence to capture**: `production/qa/smoke-balance-data-story-001-2026-MM-DD.md` documenting:
- `git mv` confirmation (file + .uid sidecar)
- `godot --headless --import --path .` invoked between move and first test run
- Full regression Overall Summary (count + 0 errors / 0 failures / 0 orphans)
- AC-6 orphan grep run result

Checklist:
- [ ] AC-1 file moved with `.uid` sidecar via `git mv`
- [ ] AC-2 `grep -rn "res://src/feature/balance" tests/ src/` returns 0 matches
- [ ] AC-3 `balance_constants.gd:18-24` doc-comment incantation example points to new path
- [ ] AC-4 G-14 class-cache refresh ran before first test invocation
- [ ] AC-5 Full regression ≥501/501 PASS post-relocation
- [ ] AC-6 `grep -rn "res://src/feature/balance" src/ tests/ tools/ docs/` returns 0 matches (excluding enumerated historical markdown refs)
- [ ] AC-7 `damage_calc.gd` + `unit_role.gd` + tests use `class_name BalanceConstants` exclusively (no path imports)

## Smoke Test Scope

Critical paths to verify before QA hand-off for the balance-data epic:

1. Game launches to main menu without crash (sanity — no balance-data init regression)
2. **`BalanceConstants.get_const("CHARGE_BONUS")`** returns expected float `0.20` post-relocation (representative scalar)
3. **`BalanceConstants.get_const("BASE_DIRECTION_MULT")`** returns Dictionary with REAR/FLANK/FRONT keys (representative dict)
4. **Damage Calc consumer integration** still computes correctly post-relocation (AC-DC-* regression — 388/388 GdUnit4 baseline maintained)
5. **Unit Role consumer integration** still resolves CLASS_DIRECTION_MULT lookups (post-relocation `class_name`-only access path)
6. Full regression `godot --headless --path . -s res://addons/gdUnit4/bin/GdUnitCmdTool.gd --ignoreHeadlessMode -a res://tests/unit -a res://tests/integration -c` reports ≥501/504 (post-Story-002) baseline; 0 errors / 0 failures / 0 orphans
7. CI workflow on PR: gdunit4 lane GREEN; new lint steps (Story 003 + 004) GREEN
8. AC-1 self-injection negative test (Story 004): inject orphan path, lint exits 1, remove before merge

*Smoke tests verified by the developer via `/smoke-check`. Reference this list when running that skill.*

---

## Playtest Requirements

**No playtest sessions required for this epic.**

Rationale: balance-data is Foundation-layer data infrastructure (data loading + lookup). It has no Visual/Feel or UI surface area; it is exercised transparently by downstream consumers (damage-calc, unit-role). Player-facing behaviour is unchanged by the ratification work — same JSON values resolve to the same in-game numbers post-relocation.

---

## Definition of Done — Balance/Data Epic

A story is DONE when ALL of the following are true:

- [ ] All acceptance criteria verified — via automated test result OR documented manual evidence
- [ ] Test file exists at the specified path for all Logic and Integration stories
- [ ] Manual evidence document exists for all Config/Data stories
- [ ] Smoke check passes (run `/smoke-check sprint` before QA hand-off)
- [ ] No regressions introduced (≥501 baseline maintained pre-Story-002; ≥504 post; ≥506 post-Story-005)
- [ ] Code reviewed (via `/code-review` or documented peer review)
- [ ] Story file updated to `Status: Complete` (via `/story-done`)

The **epic** is DONE when:
- All 5 stories Closed via `/story-done`
- All 7 MVP-COVERED TRs (007, 010, 016, 017, 018, 019, 020) verified via passing tests
- 13 Alpha-deferred TRs explicitly out-of-scope (no stories created)
- `BalanceConstants` resides at `src/foundation/balance/`
- TD-041 logged in `docs/tech-debt-register.md`
- ADR-0006 §Validation Criteria §1-§5 all GREEN per Story 004 evidence doc
